Home › Volusia County › New Smyrna Beach › SONAPA GRILLE
F 55

SONAPA GRILLE

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: April 30, 2026

Loved (4.7★) but failing (F, 55/100) · safer than 2% of Volusia County

Great reviews, failing grade. SONAPA GRILLE carries a 4.7-star reputation on 1,534 reviews, but its kitchen last graded out at 55/100 — an F on our A–F scale.

That F comes from 5 high-priority, 1 intermediate, and 2 basic violations cited on April 30, 2026. It currently ranks safer than 2% of Volusia County restaurants we grade — close to the bottom of the county. And the direction isn't reassuring: its recent inspections have been sliding, not recovering. If you want the flavor with fewer question marks, the safer-options list below maps higher-graded kitchens within a short drive.

Get directions Call (386) 402-8647

Safer options nearby

Higher-graded restaurants close to SONAPA GRILLE, by Florida DBPR grade:

  • A
    CHASES ON THE BEACH

    4.2★ 0.1 mi away

  • A
    TOUCH OF ITALY INC

    4.1★ 0.7 mi away

  • A
    WAKE UP CAFE

    4.7★ 1.3 mi away

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. April 30, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    5 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 2 basic

    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×4)
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation

  2. November 21, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 4 basic

    • 02 — Consumer advisory, date-marking & labeling of ready-to-eat foods
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 13 — Clean clothes; hair restraints; jewelry; fingernails
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
